subcodes.first_line: O loving friend! The oppressed one hath fallen into the hands of ill-omened Tus. Though hoping for fidelity, he met with naught but tyranny and persecution [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار ودود فرود مظلوم در دست طوس منحوس گرفتار شد امید وفا داشت ظلم و جفا دید
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
